subject: Tapion, a warrior figure with spiky hair in armor, holding what appears to be an instrument, against a blue energy background
suspected_ip: Tapion (Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon)
description: A humanoid warrior figure stands in a dynamic pose against a bright blue energy background. The figure has distinctive spiky hair and wears what appears to be armored or battle-ready clothing. The figure holds an object — at this resolution it reads as an instrument or small device rather than a conventional weapon, consistent with Tapion's signature ocarina/flute that he uses to contain and control Hirudegarn. The bright blue energy backdrop radiates outward, suggesting the power of an oath or invoked ability. The overall composition is a mid-shot with strong color contrast between the warm-toned figure and the cool blue background.
foreground: armored warrior figure with spiky hair holding a small instrument or device
background: bright blue energy burst radiating outward
emotion: determined resolve, stance of committed defense or invocation
